column2: Test system denial of noise-related user stories during nighttime
column3: ['Verify the system is operating during dusk or night. ', 'Attempt to create a new user story related to noise species disturbance at dusk/night. ', 'Check if the creation of the user story was not allowed. ']
column4: ["The system's current operation time should be either 'dusk' or 'night'. ", 'A dialog box appears, stating that the creation of such a user story is not allowed. ', 'The system does not create the user story and instead displays an error message or prevents its creation in some other way. ']
